gematik/authenticator.rationale: Gematik publishes official macOS .dmg releases on their GitHub repo. The latest release (4.16.1) includes a macOS .dmg installer directly from the vendor.

validation.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL -o "$tmp/app.dmg" 'https://github.com/gematik/app-Authenticator/releases/download/4.16.1/gematik-Authenticator-4.16.1.dmg' && hdiutil attach -nobrowse -mountpoint "$tmp/m" "$tmp/app.dmg" && cp -R "$tmp/m"/*.app /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "$tmp/m" && rm -rf "$tmp"
